mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE ( ID, SENDER_ID, RECEIVER_ID, CONTENT, MESSAGE_TYPE, IS_SENT, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{senderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messageType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}
)
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SENDER_ID, RECEIVER_ID, CONTENT, MESSAGE_TYPE, IS_SENT, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY FROM WS_OFFLINE_MESSAGE WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
